CustomField.formula: IF ( OR( AND( AND( IssueDate1__c >= TODAY() , IssueDate1__c - 7 <= TODAY() ) , NOT(TEXT(Alart1__c) = "承諾済み") ), AND( AND( ApproveDate1__c >= TODAY() , ApproveDate1__c - 7 <= TODAY() ) , NOT(TEXT(Alart2__c ) = "承諾済み") ) , AND( AND( CarryingDate1__c >= TODAY() , CarryingDate1__c - 10 <= TODAY() ) , NOT(TEXT(Alart3__c ) = "承諾済み") ) , AND( AND( CarryingDate1__c >= TODAY() , CarryingDate1__c - 2 <= TODAY() ) , Alart01__c = false ) , AND(AND( OnSiteWitness1__c >= TODAY() , OnSiteWitness1__c - 7 <= TODAY() ) , NOT(TEXT(Alart5__c) = "承諾済み") ) , AND( AND( OnSiteWitnessPlanningDate1__c >= TODAY() , OnSiteWitnessPlanningDate1__c - 14 <= TODAY() ) , NOT(TEXT(Alart6__c ) = "承諾済み") ), AND( AND( OnSiteWitnessPlanningDate1__c >= TODAY() , OnSiteWitnessPlanningDate1__c - 7 <= TODAY() ) , Alart03__c = false ) ), "期限前", null )
CustomField.label: 期限前アラーム
